name: Creamy Smooth Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and peanut butter together.
2. Beat in the sugars, blending well.
3. Add the eggs, vanilla extract, salt, baking soda, and flour, and mix until combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
Yield: About 5 dozen cookies
